description: Scaffold the Next.js 14 project with Tailwind CSS, TypeScript, and the luxury brand design system. Create the full application shell including layout, navigation, footer, and all page routes.
steps: Initialize a Next.js 14 project with App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and ESLint using pnpm in /projects/sandbox/amaka-fashion-studio. Use `pnpm create next-app@latest . --typescript --tailwind --eslint --app --src-dir --no-import-alias`

Configure tailwind.config.ts with the luxury brand color palette: emerald (#006B3F), gold (#D4AF37), black (#0A0A0A), cream (#FDF8F0). Add custom fonts (Playfair Display for headings, Inter or Lato for body). Extend the theme with luxury animations (fade-in, slide-up, shimmer).
Install additional dependencies: framer-motion for animations, lucide-react for icons, next-themes for potential dark mode.
Create src/app/layout.tsx with Google Fonts integration (Playfair Display + Inter), metadata for SEO (title: Amaka Fashion Atelier, description with tagline), and the global layout structure.
Create src/app/globals.css with Tailwind directives, custom CSS variables for the brand colors, luxury typography classes, custom scrollbar styling, and smooth scroll behavior.

Create src/components/Navbar.tsx - a responsive luxury navigation bar with: brand logo/name 'Amaka Fashion Atelier', mobile hamburger menu with smooth animations, navigation links (Home, Collections, About, Contact), emerald/gold color scheme, sticky positioning with backdrop blur on scroll.

Create src/components/Footer.tsx - a luxury footer with: brand name and tagline 'Crafting the Modern Nigerian Gentleman', location (Abakaliki, Nigeria), WhatsApp contact link (+234 913 127 2407), social media placeholders, copyright notice, elegant gold accent lines.

Create src/app/page.tsx (Home page) with: a full-screen hero section with luxury background and tagline overlay, featured collections grid showing the 6 categories (Senator Wear, Shirts, Suits, Casual, Traditional, Corporate) with hover effects, a brand story teaser section, call-to-action buttons linking to WhatsApp and collections.

Create src/app/collections/page.tsx - a gallery/lookbook page with: category filter buttons for all 6 clothing types, responsive grid of collection cards with elegant hover animations, each card showing category name and description with luxury styling, placeholder images using gradient backgrounds with gold accents.

Create src/app/about/page.tsx - brand story page with: the Amaka Fashion Atelier story emphasizing Nigerian heritage and modern luxury, brand values section, the craftsmanship philosophy, location prominence (Abakaliki), elegant typography and layout.

Create src/app/contact/page.tsx - contact page with: WhatsApp integration as primary contact (+234 913 127 2407), location details (Abakaliki, Nigeria), a contact form (name, email, message) with luxury styling, business hours, elegant map placeholder or location card.
acceptance_criteria: All pages (/, /collections, /about, /contact) render with the luxury emerald/gold/black/cream color scheme
Navigation is responsive with mobile hamburger menu
Footer displays brand info, location, and WhatsApp contact
Home page has hero section and collections grid
Typography uses Playfair Display for headings and Inter for body text
findings: Used Tailwind CSS v4 (CSS-based config with @theme inline block instead of tailwind.config.ts). Next.js 16.2.6 was installed (latest from create-next-app). Referenced happy-threads repo for structural patterns (framer-motion animations, lucide-react icons, luxury aesthetic). The project uses pnpm-workspace.yaml. Build produces static pages for all routes.
